task_objective: Implement a custom SteamOS-style autosync status strip for backup and restore lifecycle feedback.
tests_added: Added frontend static coverage for the portal-mounted autosync status strip, visual invariants, icon choices, failure-only autosync toasts, and avoiding Steam overlay composition APIs.
design_decisions: Implemented the strip as frontend-owned state around the existing app lifetime RPC calls instead of adding backend event emission.
Used existing react-icons FA6 exports rather than adding Font Awesome dependencies.
Kept styles inline to fit the current Decky Rollup setup without adding a CSS pipeline.
Replaced routine autosync progress and success toasts with the status strip while keeping one Decky toast for autosync failures.
results: Baseline validation was green before changes. After implementation, targeted frontend static tests, TypeScript typecheck, Rollup build, Ruff, ty, and the full pytest suite passed.
